channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated around the clock

item.title: 🇦🇸🇪🇦 ASEAN Summit addresses energy crisis from Iran war as 1,500 ships trapped in Hormuz
item.description: Southeast Asian leaders meeting in Cebu, Philippines are coordinating a regional response to the Middle East crisis, pushing for energy security and a negotiated settlement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The region faces significant risks as a major oil importer with nearly 70 days of Hormuz blockade.

item.title: 🇵🇾🇹🇼 Paraguay reaffirms Taiwan ties as China pressures last South American ally
item.description: Paraguay President Santiago Pena visited Taipei to reaffirm diplomatic support for Taiwan, one of only 12 countries maintaining formal relations. China has intensified efforts to draw Paraguay away, with lawmakers visiting Beijing amid internal debate over economic costs.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇺🇦 Armenia distances from Russia as Pashinyan says "not an ally" on Ukraine
item.description: Armenian PM Nikol Pashinyan clarified Armenia is not allied with Russia on Ukraine, confirming he will skip Moscow Victory Day parade. The Kremlin summoned Armenia's ambassador after Zelensky's visit to Yerevan, showing tensions as Armenia drifts toward EU.

item.title: 🇷🇺⚔️ Moscow scales down Victory Day parade amid Ukrainian drone threats
item.description: For the first time under Putin, Moscow's May 9 parade will feature no tanks, missiles, or armored vehicles. Mobile internet will be cut off in the capital as fears of Ukrainian strikes grow. Only infantry will march, with few foreign leaders attending.

item.title: 🚢🛢️ Maersk warns energy crunch to persist even if Iran peace deal struck
item.description: Shipping giant Maersk said the Iran war has pushed fuel costs up nearly $500 million a month, with the energy crisis set to continue even if a peace deal is reached. The warning came as oil supplies tighten further with depleted storage tanks meeting peak summer demand.

item.title: 🇦🇪🇮🇷 UAE intercepts Iranian missiles and drones amid fragile ceasefire
item.description: UAE air defenses engaged Iranian missiles and drones as tensions escalated despite Trump claiming a ceasefire remains in effect. The attack on the Gulf state marks a significant expansion of the conflict's impact on regional security.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦 Russia intercepts 50+ drones over Moscow ahead of Victory Day Parade
item.description: Mayor Sobyanin said Moscow intercepted dozens of drones targeting the capital overnight, just one day before the annual Victory Day military parade. The attacks forced cancellation of parades in cities across Russia.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel kills Hezbollah commander in first Beirut strike since ceasefire
item.description: Israel confirmed an air strike on Beirut that killed a Hezbollah commander, marking the first such strike since the ceasefire. Tensions remain high as Lebanon-Israel talks face uncertainty.

item.title: 🌍📉 Global perceptions of US fall below Russia under Trump, survey finds
item.description: Global opinion surveys show US favorability has dropped below Russia's for the first time, reflecting widespread concerns about American foreign policy under the Trump administration.

item.title: 🇧🇷🇺🇸 Brazil's Lula visits Trump in Washington seeking to avert trade tariffs
item.description: Brazilian President Lula traveled to Washington to negotiate with Trump administration officials, seeking to prevent new US trade tariffs on Brazilian exports.

item.title: 🇷🇺⚔️ Russian general assassinated, official dies from poisoning
item.description: A Russian general was killed in an assassination while a government official died from poisoning, amid heightened security concerns in Russia as Ukrainian drone strikes reach deep into Russian territory.

item.title: 📈📉 Markets react to Iran tensions as oil prices surge
item.description: Global markets fell while oil prices jumped as investors assessed the economic impact of escalating US-Iran hostilities and potential disruptions to global energy supplies.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Third round of Lebanon-Israel border talks scheduled for next week
item.description: A US official confirmed that the third round of Lebanon-Israel negotiations will proceed next week, despite ongoing tensions after the Hezbollah commander strike.

item.title: 🇰🇵⚔️ North Korea deploys new artillery targeting Seoul, commissions first destroyer
item.description: North Korea announced new long-range artillery systems targeting Seoul and commissioned its first destroyer, significantly expanding military capabilities on the Korean Peninsula.

item.title: 🇵🇰✈️ Chinese J-35 stealth jets to give Pakistan edge over India with fifth-gen tech
item.description: China's J-35 stealth fighter jets are set to provide Pakistan with fifth-generation capabilities, potentially shifting the air power balance with India as Islamabad acquires advanced military technology from Beijing.

item.title: 🇦🇪🇮🇷 UAE air defenses respond to Iranian missile and drone threats
item.description: UAE Ministry of Defense announced air defenses are actively engaging Iranian missile and drone threats, as regional tensions escalate despite reported ceasefire agreements.

item.title: 🇺🇳🇮🇷 US Iran resolution at UN faces likely vetoes from China and Russia
item.description: A US-proposed UN Security Council resolution on Iran is expected to face vetoes from China and Russia, highlighting divisions among major powers over the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🎭🇷🇺 Pussy Riot demonstrates in Venice against Russia's Biennale return
item.description: Anti-Kremlin activists Pussy Riot staged a demonstration at the Venice Biennale to protest Russia's return to the international art exhibition amid the ongoing war in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇷🇸🛢️ Serbia's president dismisses attempt by local company to buy NIS oil firm
item.description: Serbia's president rejected a local company's bid to purchase the NIS oil firm, maintaining state control over critical energy infrastructure amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🛢️💰 US oil prices jump amid Iran hostilities
item.description: US oil prices surged as military actions between the US and Iran intensified, with concerns over supply disruptions driving markets higher.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US carries out retaliatory strikes against Iran
item.description: US military forces conducted retaliatory strikes against Iranian targets after previous attacks on US interests, though Trump described the action as a "love tap" while claiming ceasefire conditions remain in effect.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇮🇷 Trump sees swift end to Iran war as US reviews peace proposal
item.description: President Trump expressed optimism about a quick resolution to the Iran conflict as the US reviewed a potential peace proposal, though fighting continued on multiple fronts.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia continues to violate Kyiv-proposed ceasefire, Zelensky says
item.description: President Zelensky accused Russia of continuing to violate Ukraine's proposed ceasefire as Moscow prepared for Victory Day celebrations under heightened security.

item.title: 🇮🇱📰 Israeli media reports on military operations
item.description: Israeli media covered ongoing military operations and regional tensions as the conflict with Iran and its proxies continued.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇨🇳 Iran war to accelerate China's shift to electric trucks from diesel
item.description: The surge in diesel prices from the Iran conflict is expected to accelerate China's transition to electric heavy trucks, speeding the decline in fuel demand for the world's largest oil importer.
